title: Sr Principal Data Engineer
description:
**Job description****Company and benefits**
Job ID**SRPRI017125**
Employment Type**Regular**
Work Style**hybrid**
Location**Bangalore,INKA,India**
Travel**Up to 25%**
Role**Sr Principal Data Engineer**
Why UKG:



At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.



We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.  

  

Senior Principal Data Engineer, Enterprise Data \& Analytics Office) \- P6  

  

About the Role  

As a Senior Principal Data Engineer (P6\) within the Enterprise Data \& Analytics Office (EDAO), you will play a strategic leadership role in shaping UKG’s enterprise data ecosystem. You will architect next\-generation data platforms and solutions that advance EDAO’s mission — empowering every decision\-maker with the right insights at the right time through a connected data ecosystem and trusted autonomous agents.  

  

This role spans data strategy, architecture, and delivery, with responsibility for designing scalable, governed, and AI\-ready data capabilities across UKG. You will collaborate with enterprise and domain teams to deliver strategic initiatives such as the Nexus Unified Data Platform, Data Mesh enablement, and governed analytics modernization.  

  

Key Responsibilities  

  

Strategic Leadership \& Architecture  

* Define and drive the enterprise data architecture strategy, aligning with EDAO’s vision, UKG’s business imperatives (Growth, Innovation, IPO Readiness), and cloud modernization goals.
* Architect and evolve data mesh and medallion frameworks (Bronze–Silver–Gold) across domains, enabling scalable, federated, and governed data products.
* Partner with Enterprise Architecture (EA) and AI teams to align platform modernization, AI enablement, and integration strategies.
* Evaluate emerging technologies (Databricks, BigQuery, Vertex AI, Atlan, Dataplex) and guide adoption to ensure UKG’s data landscape remains modern, compliant, and future\-ready.


Solution Architecture \& Delivery  

* Translate business strategies and analytics needs into reference architectures and technical blueprints.
* Oversee design and implementation of complex data solutions — from ingestion to curation to consumption — that are performant, secure, and compliant (SOX, PCI).
* Ensure architectural alignment across Data Platform Simplification, Customer 360, Metrics Operationalization, and AI/ML enablement initiatives.
* Standardize data modeling practices (conceptual, logical, physical) across EDAO and business domains.

  

Governance, Quality \& Standards  

* Lead definition and adoption of enterprise standards for data modeling, lineage, and metadata management.
* Partner with the Data Governance Office to embed governance\-by\-design principles into data pipelines and platforms.
* Establish frameworks for data quality, policy enforcement, and metadata traceability using Unity Catalog, Atlan, and Dataplex.
* Promote security\-first architecture ensuring protection of sensitive data (PII, financial, regulatory).

  

Thought Leadership \& Collaboration  

* Serve as a trusted advisor to senior leadership, influencing strategic data decisions and investment priorities.
* Act as a thought leader within EDAO, driving innovation in cloud data engineering, self\-service analytics, and AI adoption.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional leaders in Finance, CX, GTM, and Engineering to operationalize data\-driven decision\-making.
* Represent UKG in external architecture, governance, and analytics communities as an ambassador for excellence.

  

Mentorship \& Organizational Impact  

* Mentor and coach architects, engineers, and analysts, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning.
* Build architecture capability maturity across teams through reusable patterns, design reviews, and governance forums.
* Drive continuous improvement in platform performance, cost optimization, and architectural simplicity.

  

Qualifications  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 12\+ years in enterprise data architecture, engineering, and analytics roles with progressive leadership.
* Deep expertise in cloud data ecosystems — especially GCP (BigQuery, Dataplex, Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Vertex AI) and Databricks (Delta Lake, DLT, Unity Catalog).
* Proven experience with data lakehouse architectures, and governance frameworks.
* Mastery in data modeling (star, snowflake, 3NF, denormalized, semantic models).
* Strong understanding of AI/ML lifecycle, MLOps, and data science enablement.
* Demonstrated success leading complex cross\-functional programs with measurable business impact.
* Experience building SOX\- and PCI\-compliant data solutions with enterprise\-level auditability.
* Exceptional communication, stakeholder influence, and strategic storytelling skills.
* Proven ability to operate at executive altitude while maintaining technical depth.

  

Preferred Qualifications  

* Experience in Data Mesh architecture enablement within large\-scale enterprises.
* Familiarity with Atlan, Dataplex, dbt, Terraform, and Cloud Composer.
* Previous experience in a governed, federated analytics organization or horizontal data office.
* Strong knowledge of FinOps and cloud cost optimization strategies.
* Exposure to Conversational Analytics, LLMOps, or AI Agents integration.
  

Company Overview:

  



UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com.

  



UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.



Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process



For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com


NOTICE ON HIRING SCAMS  

UKG will never ask you for a copy of your driver’s license, social security card, or passport during a job inter  


ABOUT OUR JOB DESCRIPTIONS  

All job descriptions are written to accurately reflect the open job and include general work responsibilities. They do not present a comprehensive, detailed inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required for the job. Management reserves the right to revise the job or require that other or different tasks be performed if or when circumstances change.
company_description: Here at UKG, our purpose is people. UKG combines the strength and innovation of Ultimate Software and Kronos, uniting two award-winning, employee-centered cultures.

As a member of the software engineering division, you will perform high\-level design based on provided external specifications. Specify, design and implement minor changes to existing software architecture. Build highly complex enhancements and resolve complex bugs. Build and execute unit tests and unit plans. Review integration and regression test plans created by QA. Communicate with QA and porting engineering as necessary to discuss minor changes to product functionality and to ensure quality and consistency across specific products.
  

  

Duties and tasks are varied and complex needing independent judgment. Fully competent in own area of expertise. May have project lead role and or supervise lower level personnel. BS or MS degree or equivalent experience relevant to functional area. 4 years of software engineering or related experience.  



Responsibilities displayed in the job posting  

  

Oracle Fleet Manager (FM) is a very critical application to manage the Cloud environments, register customer and licenses. Fleet Manager is the core system for Change Manager processing and automation of Cloud environment patching and other system change tracking.


Fleet Manager is core system for tracking, automatic and managing the cloud environment activities.
  

Fleet manager is a secure system which provides ability for difference user will respective riles to manage the cloud related activities, it allows user to:
   

* Manage Customers and related configuration.
* Manage Customer Success Administrator/Viewer to assign customers.
* Environment Administrators, Operations and Provisioning team view and manage the various configuration and setup properties at environment level.
* Environment schedules are planned using FM system
* Data Center and other OCI information is maintained in FM system.
* Patch Bundles, Repository and Change Requests are created and life cycle is managed in FM system
* Playbook and Runbook allows user to track and communicate to end user
* User assign CRs to engineer and automated the system
* FM System is integrated to various system like E2E, JC, etc. for CR processing activities, and get back the status.
* CR Processing allows user to track and update the status
* FM System has robust notification functionality for internal and external communications.

title: EY - GDS Consulting - AI and DATA - Responsible AI - Senior
description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.

 **Responsible AI Engineer (Governance \& Safety) \- Senior**

**Role summary**


You will lead **AI governance, safety, and compliance engineering**—operationalizing **LLMOps/Agentic Ops**, security and privacy controls, **LLM evaluation**, and **guardrails/ethics** for production AI systems. The remit spans policy to code: frameworks, controls, tooling, documentation, red teaming, and continuous evaluation.

 **Key responsibilities**

* Establish and run **LLMOps/Agentic Ops practic**es (lifecycle, approvals, versioning, observability, incident response/playbooks) integrated with platform tooling.
* Define and enforce **governance \& security** controls (PII protection, data residency, model access, content safety, jailbreak/prompt injection defenses), integrating with enterprise security.
* Build **LLM evaluation** pipelines (groundedness/faithfulness, toxicity/PII, bias/fairness, robustness) and quality gates for pre prod and ongoing **post deployment** monitoring.
* Implement **guardrails/ethics** (policy as code, allow/deny lists, safety filters, red teaming harnesses) and ensure compliant documentation (model cards, data sheets, DPIAs).
* Contribute production grade **Python** libraries, policies, and **APIs** that product teams can adopt “as a service”; partner with platform teams on **AWS/Azure** controls.

 **Must have skills**

* **LLMOps/Agentic Ops** patterns and tooling
* **Governance/Security** (threat modeling for LLMs, privacy, access controls)
* **LLM Evaluation** frameworks (human\+automatic metrics; eval harnesses)
* **Guardrails/Ethics** techniques and incident playbooks
* **Python**
* **AWS/Azure**
* **API development** for governance services

 **Good to have**

* Familiarity with **RAG/advanced agentic AI** to guide safe design choices

 **Qualifications \& experience**

* B.Tech/M.Tech/MS in CS/EE or equivalent.
* **4\+ years** in Responsible AI Engineering

 **EY \| Building a better working world**

  

  

EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.

  

  

Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.

  

  

Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.
company_description: At EY, we are committed to building a better working world.

title: EY - GDS Consulting - AIA - GEN AI - Senior Manager
description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.


We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.


Join EY and help to build a better working world.

 **Function: Consulting Position: Senior Manager**

**Department: Technology Consulting, D\&A Title: AI Architect (GenAI/AI Insurance)**

**Position: Full Time Educational qualification: BTech/Masters/PhD**

  

We are seeking an experienced AI Architect with over 15 years of professional experience. He needs to be passionate about D\&A and technology. With a deep understanding of data processing, data structure, algorithms, and machine learning. AI Architect will develop and implement the company's AI capabilities and solutions.

 **Responsibilities:**

* Design and implement AI/Gen AI applications, systems, and infrastructure across major clouds (Azure, AWS and GCP)
* Collaborate with data engineers \& data scientists in designing data pipelines \& AI/ML models.
* Collaborate with clients \& stakeholders to translate business and functional requirements into robust, scalable, operable solutions.
* Participate in architectural decisions, contribute to the development of architectures for industry\-wide use cases, and design architectures for AI/ML and Generative AI
* Set the standards for engineering best practices.
* Identify opportunities where generative AI can provide value and solve business problems.
* Responsible for creating POCs and POVs across horizontals and industry use cases.
* Write high\-quality, efficient, testable code in Python and other languages.
* Stay up to date with the latest AI trends and evaluate state\-of\-the\-art AI technologies/framework to drive innovation.
* Facilitate design and architecture workshops and mentor AI engineers in coding best practices and problem\-solving.

 **Qualifications:**

* A minimum of 15 years of professional experience and around 5\-8 years in building and deploying AI solutions on\-premises or on cloud platforms.
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Data Science, Engineering, or related field.
* Experience in providing the MLOps, LLMOps and AgentOps Architecture design
* Experience in deploying AI/ML solutions on different cloud platforms like Azure, AWS and/or Google Cloud.
* Experience in using and orchestration LLM models on cloud platforms i.e., OpenAI @ Azure/AWS Bedrock/ GCP Vertex AI or Gemini AI
* Experience in writing SQL and data modelling.
* Experience in designing and implementation of AI solution using microservice based architecture.
* Understanding of machine learning, deep learning, NLP and GenAI.
* Strong programming skills in Python and/or pyspark.
* Proven experience in integrating authentication security measures within machine learning operations and applications.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and ability to connect AI capabilities to business value.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Proven experience in AI/ML solution deployment process on Kubernetes, Web Apps, Databricks or on similar platforms.
* Familiarity with MLOps/ LLMOps and Agent Ops concepts and tech stack. Experience in code versioning, MLFlow, batch prediction and real\-time end point workflows.
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps / GitHub actions/ Jenkins / Terraform / AWS CFT etc.
* Experience with responsible AI concepts

 **Other Responsibilities:**

* Manage end to end project delivery\- scoping, solutioning, designing, developing, testing, deploying or maintaining.
* Ensuring the solutions meet the client requirements and expectations.
* Communicate effectively with the clients and internal stakeholders throughout the project.
* Identify new opportunities and generate proposals for potential clients.
* Present the solutions and showcase the value proposition to senior stakeholders.

 **EY \| Building a better working world**

EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.


Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.


EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.
